chunks.title: About Me
chunks.content: I'm Awais Ur Rehman, a full stack developer with 3 years of professional experience. I build web and mobile applications end to end, from database design to production deployment. My work is currently running at Pakistan's two largest banks (UBL and HBL) through the Odin social listening platform, and SANHA Pakistan's certification portal handles 50K+ monthly users. I graduated from COMSATS University Islamabad with a BS in Software Engineering in 2025.

chunks.title: Skills & Tools
chunks.content: Languages: JavaScript, TypeScript, Python, Dart. Frontend: React, Next.js, Tailwind CSS, Bootstrap. Mobile: Flutter. Backend: Node.js, Express.js, REST APIs, WebSockets, Redis Pub/Sub, Bull Queue, FastAPI. Databases: MongoDB, MySQL, Firebase, Supabase, Neo4j. AI/ML: Custom CNN models, ML Kit, RAG pipelines, Generative AI, Google Gemini, Google ADK, Vertex AI, TensorFlow. DevOps: Docker, Docker Compose, Nginx, GCP, Google Cloud Run, Vercel, Render, Git, CI/CD.

chunks.title: Projects Portfolio
chunks.content: ODIN (Social Listening Platform): Built for UBL and HBL. Microservice architecture with Node.js + Python, Redis Pub/Sub, Docker Compose. Integrated Meta Business API. Reduced message processing from 1.4 minutes to 0.4 seconds. Includes sentiment analysis, auto-categorization, unified inbox, marketing dashboard. Link: https://odin.hbl.com/

chunks.title: OculaCare Project
chunks.content: OculaCare (AI Eye Disease Detection): Flutter app with custom CNN models, Neo4j graph-based symptom analysis, RAG treatment recommendations. Validated with ophthalmologists at WATIM Hospital. Won 1st at COMSATS Industrial Expo 2024 and 2nd at Securiti.ai AI Security Challenge.

chunks.title: SANHA & Alara Projects
chunks.content: SANHA Pakistan: Full website and admin portal (React + Node.js). 50K+ monthly users. Page load cut from 4.2s to 2.3s. JWT auth with role-based dashboards. Link: https://www.sanha.org.pk/. Alara (Customer Analytics): Analytics and workflow platform for Faysal Bank and Bank Alfalah. Link: https://alara.faysalbank.com/

chunks.title: OxyBlue, Nomadly & Other Projects
chunks.content: OxyBlue (Water Delivery): Offline-first Flutter + Node.js app. Riders work without internet, sync when reconnected. Cut fulfillment from 25 to 15 minutes. Nomadly: Invite-only social app for digital nomads. Flutter + Node.js + WebSockets. Real-time messaging, verified invite chain. MedLens (In Progress): Real-time first aid AI using Google ADK, Gemini Live, Vertex AI RAG. Audio and video-based injury assessment. RigZone LLC: Multi-vendor platform built with Next.js + PHP. Link: https://rigzonellc.com/. IAE: Coursera-style learning platform (MERN stack) launched in government partnership. Link: https://www.iae.com.pk/welcome. Otaku: Anime social network with Flutter + Node.js.

chunks.title: Work Experience
chunks.content: Full Stack Developer at Bridgeframe (Sep 2025 to present, Karachi). Built SANHA Pakistan's website, RigZone LLC platform, and company portfolio site. Full Stack Developer at ISSM Labelling Solutions (Jan 2025 to Sep 2025, Islamabad). Built Odin social listening platform, Alara analytics platform, IAE learning platform, and UBL WhatsApp banking widget. Full Stack Lead at Ceven Technologies (Jun 2024 to Dec 2024, Remote). Led technical direction, architecture decisions, and delivery. Full Stack Developer at OxyBlue (Nov 2023 to Jun 2024, Karachi). Built the water delivery platform with offline-first architecture. Web Development Intern at Urban Codes (Mar 2023 to Aug 2023, Islamabad). Built the Nafees client website.

chunks.title: Education
chunks.content: Bachelor of Software Engineering, COMSATS University Islamabad (2021 to 2025).

chunks.title: Awards & Recognition
chunks.content: 1st Place at COMSATS Industrial Expo 2024. 2nd Place at Securiti.ai AI Security Challenge 2024. Best Presentation Award at AI Challenge 2024. Flutter Kahoot Quiz Winner. 1st Position at Syberkoza.

chunks.title: Blog Posts
chunks.content: How I cut message processing from 1.4 minutes to 0.4 seconds at Pakistan's largest banks. Building offline-first apps: lessons from a water delivery fleet. What I learned building an AI eye disease detector with real doctors. Building AI agents that actually help: MedLens and what I'm learning.

chunks.title: Contact & Social
chunks.content: Email: awaisjarral37@gmail.com. Phone: +92 344 5123196. Portfolio: https://awais-ur-rehman.vercel.app/. GitHub: https://github.com/awais-ur-rehman. LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/awais-ur-rehman-88615a217/. Instagram: https://instagram.com/_awais._.jarral_/.

chunks.title: Roles & Fit (Recruiter)
chunks.content: Target roles: Full Stack Developer (MERN), Frontend Engineer (React/Next.js), Flutter/Mobile Developer, AI/ML Engineer (applied). Open to remote positions globally and on-site in Pakistan. Particularly interested in European startups. Strengths: shipping production apps end to end, performance optimization (documented 1.4min to 0.4s improvement), offline-first mobile architecture, integrating ML models into user-facing products, working with real stakeholders (doctors, bank teams) to validate solutions.

chunks.title: Core Skills Summary (Recruiter)
chunks.content: Frontend: React, Next.js, Tailwind CSS, TypeScript. Mobile: Flutter (offline-first, ML integration). Backend: Node.js, Express, REST APIs, WebSockets, Redis, Bull Queue, Python/FastAPI. Databases: MongoDB, MySQL, Firebase, Supabase, Neo4j. AI/ML: Custom CNN models, RAG pipelines, Google Gemini/ADK, Vertex AI, ML Kit. DevOps: Docker, Docker Compose, Nginx, GCP, Vercel, Render, Git, CI/CD.

chunks.title: Experience Summary (Recruiter)
chunks.content: 3 years of professional experience across startups and enterprise software. Built products used by Pakistan's largest banks (UBL, HBL), shipped 10+ production applications. Industries: fintech (Odin, Alara), healthtech (OculaCare, MedLens, PHJI), certification (SANHA), logistics (OxyBlue), consumer apps (Otaku, Nomadly).

chunks.title: Location & Availability (Recruiter)
chunks.content: Location: Pakistan (PKT, UTC+5). Preference: remote-first. Open to contract or full-time. Comfortable with async workflows and overlapping hours with EU/US teams.

chunks.title: Process & Quality (Recruiter)
chunks.content: Approach: understand the problem first, prototype fast, iterate with real user feedback, then harden for production. Quality: TypeScript, linting, testing, CI/CD, code reviews, structured logging. Security: JWT auth, RBAC, input validation, environment-scoped secrets.

chunks.title: Bot Response Guidelines
chunks.content: Tone: direct, specific, no filler. Use concrete numbers and project names. Provide links when relevant. Don't inflate experience or use promotional language. If asked about something Awais hasn't done, say so honestly.
